title: dichaelia commixta
intro: Dichaelia commixta, also known as the Common Yellow-wood, is a deciduous tree species native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Dichaelia commixta include treating fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as protecting against infections and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of decoctions, infusions, and ointments, often used by traditional healers in Africa to treat various ailments.
